_comment: Golden conformance vectors for the identity/v1 axis. Loaded by every kind: identity reference (ADR-003 cross-run). authenticate cases drive IdentityService.Authenticate with an opaque credential and assert (authenticated, subject, tenant). authorize cases set the end-user subject in the rat-callmeta-bin metadata envelope (ADR-007), drive Authorize, and assert (allowed, deny_code). deny_code is the DenyCode enum NAME without the DENY_CODE_ prefix.
